Édouard Manet

27 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Guitarist
by Édouard Manet
France, 19th century · 1861 · etching
La Toilette
by Édouard Manet
France, 19th century · 1862 · etching
Boy with Pitcher (La Régalade)
by Édouard Manet
France · Impressionism · 1862–1872 · Oil on canvas
Le Déjeuner sur l'herbe
by Édouard Manet
Early Modern · 1863
A nude woman picnics with two fully dressed men. The scandal wasn't the nudity — it was that she looks directly at the viewer, unashamed.
Olympia
by Édouard Manet
Early Modern · 1863
A courtesan reclining nude, a Black maid bringing flowers, a cat raising its tail. The Salon hung it high to keep people from slashing it.
Fish (Still Life)
by Édouard Manet
France · 19th century · 1864 · Oil on canvas
Sea View, Calm Weather (Vue de mer, temps calme)
by Édouard Manet
France · Impressionism · 1864 · Oil on canvas
The Tragic Actor (Rouvière in the role of Hamlet)
by Édouard Manet
France · 1865–1866 · Etching and plate tone in black on ivory laid paper
Jesus Mocked by the Soldiers
by Édouard Manet
France · Realism · 1865 · Oil on canvas

by Édouard Manet
France, 19th century · 1865 · lithograph
